side_effects.description: Red, itchy rash at injection site. Rash is raised, intense itching that comes and goes, skin remains red for over a week after injection. After one month, rash worsened in size, redness, itchiness and duration.

protocol_notes: Started Retatrutide on November 14, 2025. Stored in refrigerator in dark container. Wiped vial with alcohol after each use and before injections. Injected subcutaneously below bellybutton. Pinning around same area. Using fresh needles each time. Former nurse with meticulous injection protocol. Rash began approximately 7 weeks after starting.
